content.text:
The file /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4 has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4:
   159	
   160	// 预处理信息处理，可以从预处理信息中获得文件名以及行号
   161	// 预处理信息中的第一个数字即为行号
   162	LineAfterPreprocessing
   163	    :   '#' Whitespace* ~[\r\n]*
   164	        {
   165	            // Extract line number and filename from preprocessor directive
   166	            std::string text = getText();
   167	            
   168	            // Use a separate function to avoid scoping issues
   169	            handlePreprocessorDirective(text);
   170	        }
   171	        -> skip
   172	    ;
   173	
   174	Whitespace
   175	    :   [ \t]+
   176	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.
